page_content:
### **Email Template: Dr. Vijay Vaidyanathan**
*(The Industry Expert)*  
Subject: Requesting Updated Letter of Recommendation – [Your Name]  
Dear Dr. Vaidyanathan,  
I hope you're well! I’m reaching out to request an updated letter of recommendation for my graduate school applications (specifically in medicine and AI). As you’ve previously shared, your courses provided me with invaluable insights into industrial experience—particularly how engineering principles apply directly to medical innovation.  
This recent work has deepened that connection, especially as I’ve explored [briefly mention specific project or research], which now reflects my growing interest in bridging technology and healthcare. Your guidance on connecting academic concepts to real-world applications continues to shape how I approach my studies.  
I’d be grateful if you could update your letter to reflect these developments and include a brief note about this new direction. Please let me know what format or timeline would work best for you (e.g., draft submission by [date]). Once finalized, I’ll ensure it’s uploaded promptly to the TMDSAS/AMCAS portals.  
Thank you again for your mentorship and for helping me see how theory translates into meaningful impact in medicine.  
Respectfully,
[Your Full Name]
[Student ID/Program, if applicable]
[Contact Information]  
---
